title: 2026 Golden Globes Predictions from an Entertainment Editor
text: Philip Mutz, VP of News and Entertainment at PureWow, shared his predictions for the 83rd annual Golden Globes ceremony airing January 11, 2026. In the television drama actress category, Mutz predicted Rhea Seehorn to win for "Pluribus." His major television predictions included "The Pitt" winning Best Drama Series, "The Studio" winning Best Comedy Series, and "Adolescence" winning Best Limited Series. In the Best Actress (Drama) category, Mutz specifically highlighted Seehorn's strong positioning, following her critical acclaim for the Vince Gilligan-created sci-fi series.
